pullRequest.title: DOM-75031 chore(Admin): Rework user admin services to support keycloak-only

nodes.body: Can we perhaps say "User hasn't logged in yet" or something like that just so it's clear to customers how they can resolve it themselves without coming to support
"Can't update until user logs in for the first time", perhaps? Or too long for a title?
is there a ticket for this TODO?

More than a ticket, it's part of:
https://dominodatalab.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/ENG/pages/4044029961/Deprecated+Sunsetted+Features

Added as a new entry.
I think targetUser is good but thoughts on renaming it to "idpUser"?

_Aha! You fell into `userKeycloakHelper`'s trap._ It's not actually an IDP user.

`userKeycloakHelper.getDominoUserByKeycloakId` actually runs a `mergeUser` between the `maybeDominoUserId` and the actual `idpUser`, so the returned entity is none of them, but an updated version of any of them.
Can we call it mergedUser then?

Hmmm. The issue is that later on it is actually further "merged" (kind of) with the result from the upgrade. 
Thus why it is called _target_, as it is whatever the target is, regardless of whether it's coming from a dominoUser or a keycloak user. Because if only the Keycloak user is present, it will be only an IDP user (without merging).
ah ok we can keep it as is then
